classColumnTuples: notification_body::TEXT::false::::Full body text of the push notification providing context and call-to-action.,notification_title::TEXT::false::::Short headline text of the push notification  displayed in the device notification shade.,triggered_by_stage::UUID::false::::Links a PushNotification to the RouteStage whose completion or activation triggered the notification dispatch.,deep_link_route::TEXT::false::::Expo deep-link URI that opens the relevant screen in ZOE LA Mobile when the notification is tapped.,notification_category::TEXT::false::::Category identifier from the NotificationCategoryScheme  used to route and filter notifications in the app.,sent_to_person::UUID::false::::Links a PushNotification to the PersonProfile whose device receives the notification.@@@resourceType::TEXT::false::::The type of resource or service this capacity record describes  e.g. food  clothing  counseling  housing.,capacityPartnerId::TEXT::false::::The identifier of the partner organization to which this capacity record belongs.,availabilityUpdatedAt::TIMESTAMPTZ::false::::The date and time when the current availability count was last updated.,waitlistCount::INTEGER::false::::The number of individuals or households currently on the waitlist for this resource type at the partner organization.,weeklyCapacity::INTEGER::false::::The total weekly service capacity of the partner organization for this resource type.,currentAvailability::INTEGER::false::::The number of service slots currently available at the partner organization for this resource type.@@@matched_at::TIMESTAMPTZ::false::::ISO-8601 timestamp when this need-resource match was created.,match_status::UUID::false::::Current lifecycle state of this match from a SKOS controlled vocabulary.,substitute_allowed::BOOLEAN::false::::When true  the routing engine may fulfill this match with a resource from an equivalent substitute category.,quantity_matched::NUMERIC::false::::Quantity of the resource (in resource units) allocated to this need match.,partner_relay_allowed::BOOLEAN::false::::When true  fulfillment of this match may be relayed to an external partner organization's capacity.,need_id::TEXT::false::::Identifier of the service need being matched. Foreign key to the need domain.,match_id::TEXT::false::::UUID primary key uniquely identifying this need-resource match record.,resource_code::TEXT::false::::Code of the resource type allocated to satisfy this need. Foreign key to zoe Resource.@@@meeting_start_time::TEXT::false::::ISO-8601 time-of-day at which this specific meeting instance begins.,meeting_for_group::UUID::false::::Associates the GroupMeeting with its Connect Group.,meeting_is_cancelled::BOOLEAN::false::::True when this specific meeting instance has been cancelled. Cancelled meetings are retained in the event log for process-mining completeness.,meeting_derived_from_schedule::UUID::false::group_schedule::Links the meeting instance back to the GroupSchedule from which it was generated.,meeting_date::DATE::false::::ISO-8601 calendar date of the individual meeting instance.,meeting_location::TEXT::false::::Human-readable address or platform description for this meeting instance  e.g. '123 Main St  Room 4' or 'Zoom link in group chat'.@@@prayed_for_count::INTEGER::false::::Number of members who have indicated they are interceding for this prayer request.,is_public::BOOLEAN::false::::True if the event is visible to unregistered visitors; false if restricted to members.,campus_id::TEXT::false::::Identifier of the ZOE LA campus to which this prayer request is routed for pastoral follow-up.
classDescriptions: A push notification dispatched to a PersonProfile's device when a RouteStage transition occurs. Carries a title, body, category, and deep-link route back into the app.|Service capacity offered by an external partner organization that can fulfill relayed needs.|A bridge object recording a lawful many-to-many relationship between a service need and a matching resource allocation. Carries match quantity, status, and routing metadata.|An individual meeting instance of a Connect Group, derived from the GroupSchedule. Records the actual meeting date, start time, physical location, and cancellation status.|Requests for intercessory prayer, which may also indicate underlying pastoral need.
classNames: Push Notification|Partner Capacity|Resource Need Match|Group Meeting|Prayer Request
